'''pafogo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:beadery|beadery]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-f-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:beadery|beadery]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| pafogo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:pæfegeth|pæfegeth]] || [[word:pæfegej|pæfegej]] || [[word:pæfegesh|pæfegesh]] || [[word:pæfege|pæfege]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:pafofogoth|pafofogoth]] || [[word:pafofogoj|pafofogoj]] || [[word:pafofogosh|pafofogosh]] || [[word:pafofogo|pafofogo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:pafogoth|pafogoth]] || [[word:pafogoj|pafogoj]] || [[word:pafogosh|pafogosh]] || [[word:pafogo|pafogo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:pafofgoth|pafofgoth]] || [[word:pafofgoj|pafofgoj]] || [[word:pafofgosh|pafofgosh]] || [[word:pafofgof|pafofgof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:pafogotho|pafogotho]] || [[word:pafogojo|pafogojo]] || [[word:pafogosho|pafogosho]] || [[word:pafogoko|pafogoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:pafogoth|pafogoth]] || [[word:pafogoj|pafogoj]] || [[word:pafogosh|pafogosh]] || [[word:pafogo|pafogo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:pafogothol|pafogothol]] || [[word:pafogojol|pafogojol]] || [[word:pafogoshol|pafogoshol]] || [[word:pafogokol|pafogokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:pafogothotho|pafogothotho]] || [[word:pafogojojo|pafogojojo]] || [[word:pafogoshosho|pafogoshosho]] || [[word:pafogoko|pafogoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:pafogothon|pafogothon]] || [[word:pafogojon|pafogojon]] || [[word:pafogoshon|pafogoshon]] || [[word:pafogokon|pafogokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:pafogothoro|pafogothoro]] || [[word:pafogojoro|pafogojoro]] || [[word:pafogoshoro|pafogoshoro]] || [[word:pafogokoro|pafogokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d414c41}}
